tech_news.title: YouTube Premium is getting a US price hike of up to $4/month - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: YouTube Premium is getting a price hike in the US, with all plans going up in cost by up to $4 effective over the next few months.

tech_news.title: "This is not a game that is about to face some sort of imminent shutdown" - Marathon reportedly had a budget of $200m, and while player numbers are dipping, team morale remains good - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Marathon reportedly had a development of over at least $200m, and likely over $250m.

tech_news.title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft is removing unnecessary Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps. Notepad no longer has a Copilot button, as part of plans to fix Windows 11.

tech_news.title: Crimson Desert Dev Pearl Abyss Outlines Upcoming Changes in Response to Feedback - IGN
tech_news.description: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has outlined a number of significant changes coming to the game in the coming months, each addressing various community complaints that were highlighted recently. Here's everything you need to know.

tech_news.title: Google Offers Free PC Upgrade For 500 Million Windows Users - Forbes
tech_news.description: All change for Windows — it's now decision time for 30% of all PC owners.

tech_news.title: WhatsApp is bringing Status updates to the top of the Chats tab - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: The new WhatsApp build on TestFlight includes references to an upcoming change that will bring Status updates to the Chats tab.

tech_news.title: Mario Kart World Has Been Updated To Version 1.6.1, Here Are The Full Patch Notes - Nintendo Life
tech_news.description: This small update is available now

tech_news.title: Forza Horizon 6 Is Every Japanese Driving Fantasy Rolled into One: Hands-On Preview - IGN
tech_news.description: The Forza Horizon series took a long time to land in Japan. After a few days in its meticulously modelled map, I’m doubtful I’ll ever want to leave.

tech_news.title: FBI used iPhone notification data to retrieve deleted Signal messages - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: The FBI was able to recover deleted Signal messages from an iPhone by extracting data stored in the device’s notification database.

tech_news.title: Cult Hit Doki Doki Literature Club Fights Removal From Google Play Store Over ‘Depiction Of Sensitive Themes’ - Kotaku
tech_news.description: The acclaimed visual novel had amassed thousands of positive user reviews
